failures.description: The agent invented/altered the answer by replacing the grounded tool count of 13 with an unsupported count of 20 and fabricating record ID 0000000000.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to count available Mechanical Keyboard options. The correct evidence was available by index 3: ProductCatalogSearch returned count 13. At index 4, the Executor produced an answer saying there are 20 options and cited record 0000000000. Both the count 20 and the record ID are absent from the tool output and contradict the available evidence. This incorrect information was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved it despite acknowledging the tool returned 13.
